records.question: Which catalog structures have Diet Pepsi entries with a length of exactly 8 and height of exactly 3, are part of the Chocolate catalog that was last revised on 2017-09-26 12:10:36, and have additional attributes with a value of 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.length = '8' AND catalogs.catalog_name = 'Chocolate' AND catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Diet Pepsi' AND catalog_contents.height = '3' AND catalogs.date_of_latest_revision = '2017-09-26 12:10:36' AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure cs
JOIN Catalog_Contents cc ON cs.catalog_level_number = cc.catalog_level_number
JOIN Catalogs c ON cs.catalog_id = c.catalog_id
JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes ccaa ON cc.catalog_entry_id = ccaa.catalog_entry_id
WHERE cc.catalog_entry_name = 'Diet Pepsi'
AND cc.length = '8'
AND cc.height = '3'
AND c.catalog_name = 'Chocolate'
AND c.date_of_latest_revision = '2017-09-26 12:10:36'
AND ccaa.attribute_value = '0'

records.question: Which Category level catalog structure entries have a catalog entry named Tizer with a price in pounds of 331.43?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Tizer' AND catalog_contents.price_in_pounds = 331.43 AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T2.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Contents AS T1
INNER JOIN Catalog_Structure AS T2 ON T1.catalog_level_number = T2.catalog_level_number
WHERE T1.catalog_entry_name = 'Tizer' AND T1.price_in_pounds = 331.43 AND T2.catalog_level_name = 'Category'

records.question: Which catalog structures have a catalog level name of exactly Sub-Category and belong to catalogs that were revised on or after 2017-10-26 01:16:51?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
WHERE catalogs.date_of_latest_revision >= '2017-10-26 01:16:51' AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Sub-Category'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure cs
JOIN Catalogs c ON cs.catalog_id = c.catalog_id
WHERE cs.catalog_level_name = 'Sub-Category'
AND c.date_of_latest_revision >= '2017-10-26 01:16:51'

records.question: Which catalog entries are exactly at the Category level?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
WHERE catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure cs
JOIN Catalog_Contents cc ON cs.catalog_level_number = cc.catalog_level_number
WHERE cs.catalog_level_name = 'Category'

records.question: Which catalog structures contain product stock number 61 py and have an additional attribute with value 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.product_stock_number = '61 py' AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure cs
JOIN Catalog_Contents cc ON cs.catalog_level_number = cc.catalog_level_number
JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes ccaa ON cc.catalog_entry_id = ccaa.catalog_entry_id
WHERE cc.product_stock_number = '61 py' AND ccaa.attribute_value = '1'

records.question: Which catalog structure entries are for products in the Jam catalog published by Grady & Kautzer, where the publication date is on or after 2011-07-22 04:57:19 and the latest revision date is on or before 2017-03-30 09:15:37?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
WHERE catalogs.catalog_publisher = 'Grady & Kautzer' AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Product' AND catalogs.date_of_publication >= '2011-07-22 04:57:19' AND catalogs.date_of_latest_revision <= '2017-03-30 09:15:37' AND catalogs.catalog_name = 'Jam'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure cs
JOIN Catalogs c ON cs.catalog_id = c.catalog_id
WHERE c.catalog_name = 'Jam'
AND c.catalog_publisher = 'Grady & Kautzer'
AND c.date_of_publication >= '2011-07-22 04:57:19'
AND c.date_of_latest_revision <= '2017-03-30 09:15:37'

records.question: What catalog structure entries at the Category level are linked to Mountain Dew items that have a length exactly 8, width exactly 5, and price in euros at most 457.4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.length = '8' AND catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Mountain Dew' AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category' AND catalog_contents.width = '5' AND catalog_contents.price_in_euros <= 457.4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure cs
JOIN Catalog_Contents cc ON cs.catalog_level_number = cc.catalog_level_number
WHERE cs.catalog_level_name = 'Category'
AND cc.catalog_entry_name LIKE '%Mountain Dew%'
AND cc.length = '8'
AND cc.width = '5'
AND cc.price_in_euros <= 457.4

records.question: Which catalog entries come from product stock number 52 ee, have a height of 7, width of 8, and length of 9, an attribute value of 0, and cost at least 360.5 dollars?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.height = '7' AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '0' AND catalog_contents.width = '8' AND catalog_contents.length = '9' AND catalog_contents.price_in_dollars >= 360.5 AND catalog_contents.product_stock_number = '52 ee'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T2.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Contents AS T1
INNER JOIN Catalog_Structure AS T2 ON T1.catalog_level_number = T2.catalog_level_number
INNER JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes AS T3 ON T1.catalog_entry_id = T3.catalog_entry_id
WHERE T1.product_stock_number = '52 ee'
AND T1.height = '7'
AND T1.width = '8'
AND T1.length = '9'
AND T3.attribute_value = '0'
AND T1.price_in_dollars >= 360.5

records.question: Which sub-categories have Root beer in their catalog contents?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Sub-Category' AND catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Root beer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure AS T1
INNER JOIN Catalog_Contents AS T2 ON T1.catalog_level_number = T2.catalog_level_number
WHERE T2.catalog_entry_name LIKE '%Root beer%'
